violations.description: Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory In Cooking area both side was not kept clean. Food debris in sink.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Tongues by the flat grill were stored in a container of water. This water was not flowing.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. Plates and bowls on the storage shelf across from the warmer were not inverted or covered.
